title: NovaMind Bridge Protocol
description: Standardized IPC schema between Python Ecosystem and Godot Client. Protocol version 1.0.0.

protocol_version.description: Protocol version. Mismatch causes immediate disconnect.

event_type.description: Semantic event type. Strict enum — unknown values are rejected.

sequence_id.description: Monotonically increasing transport-layer sequence counter per connection. Used for ordering diagnostics and replay chronology. NOT a semantic causal chain — gaps trigger reconciliation, not hard disconnect in production mode.

causal_parent_id.description: msg_id of the event that causally produced this event. Null for root events (user commands). Used for semantic dependency tracking, replay validation, and invariant enforcement.

timestamp.description: UNIX float timestamp at dispatch time.

msg_id.description: Globally unique UUID per message. Idempotency key — duplicate msg_id must be discarded silently.

correlation_id.description: UUID shared across a causal event chain (User Command → Task → Tool Call → Visualization).
